nasb.text: Now when Moses saw that the people were out of control—for Aaron had let them get out of control to be a derision among their enemies—

esv.text: And when Moses saw that the people had broken loose (for Aaron had let them break loose, to the derision of their enemies),

cnv.text: 摩西看見人民放肆原來是亞倫縱容他們，使他們成為那些起來與他們為敵的人的笑柄，

ccb.text: 摩西见百姓放肆，亚伦纵容他们，使他们成为敌人的笑柄，
